Name: FE_PrntDir
Description: Directory containing parent FastEddy output files. Files are expected to be named as FE_PrntOutPrefix.TIMESTEP.

Name: FE_PrntOutPrefix
Description: Base filename of the parent FastEddy output series. The integer timestep index is appended after a period.

Name: itMin
Description: Starting timestep index of the parent FastEddy file series.

Name: dt_FE
Description: Parent FastEddy model timestep (seconds). Used to convert between timestep index and physical time. |br| Must match the timestep used in the parent simulation exactly.

Name: outputFrequency
Description: Output interval of FastEddy data. Used to compute timestep increment.

Name: timeLengthSec
Description: Total simulation time (seconds) to process for FastEddy input.

Name: ideal_opt
Description: Flag for idealized (non-real-data) simulations. |br| If true: use Cartesian coordinates (xPos, yPos). |br| If false: use lat/lon-based interpolation.
